question: What is the price of an annual ATM transit pass for students under 27 in Milan, and how does it compare with the standard adult annual urban pass?
answer:
The student annual ATM pass is listed as **about €200**. [source: relocation/www-collegiate-it-quanto-costa-studiare-a-milano.md]

I don’t have the price of the **standard adult annual urban pass** in the available sources, so I can’t compare the two.

question: List the steps an international student must follow to register with Italy's National Health Service (SSN) in Milan.
answer:
Steps explicitly available in the sources:

1. **Make sure you have appropriate health insurance**: all international students are required to have it. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-international-students-freshly-enrolled-students-you-arrive-health-services.md]

2. **Check if you can apply through ASL/ATS**: foreign citizens can apply for the SSN/ASL service only if they have a valid permit of stay when needed. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-international-students-freshly-enrolled-students-you-arrive-health-services.md]

3. **If you are an EU/EEA/Swiss student staying more than 3 months**, get the **S1 form** from your home country’s health insurance agency. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md]

4. **Go to the “Scelta e Revoca” counter at ATS Milano** to register with the Regional Health Service, bringing a photocopy of a valid ID, your fiscal code, and the completed S1 form. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md]

5. **If you are a non-EU student**, you can access the Italian National Healthcare System by voluntarily enrolling and paying a **€700 annual fee**, which gives you a general practitioner and the same benefits as Italian citizens. [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-health-insurance.md]

6. **Renew your registration each year** if you are a non-EU student, together with your residence permit. [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-health-insurance.md]

question: Confrontando i bus diretti da Malpensa a Milano Centrale tra i vettori documentati (Autostradale/Malpensa Bus Express, Terravision, Flibco, FlixBus): qual e' il prezzo di partenza piu' basso indicato per ciascun vettore?
answer:
| Vettore | Prezzo di partenza più basso indicato |
|---|---:|
| Autostradale / Malpensa Bus Express | **Da 4,99€ a persona** indicato nel riquadro acquisto; nel testo è indicato anche “biglietto singolo: a partire da 8 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Terravision | **A partire da 6 euro**: la fonte indica biglietti online “a partire da 6-10 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Flibco | **A partire da circa 8 euro**: la fonte indica “circa 8-10 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| FlixBus | Non è documentato come bus diretto Malpensa–Milano Centrale; la fonte dice solo che collega Malpensa con varie città italiane ed europee e che i biglietti partono da circa 6 euro a seconda della rotta. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |

question: Quale documento devo portare per accedere alla Biblioteca Bocconi, e qual e' la capienza massima dell'edificio?
answer:
Per accedere alla Biblioteca devi portare la tua Bocconi ID card oppure usare il QR code creato tramite yoU@B student diary. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

La capienza massima della Biblioteca è di 720 persone. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

question: Provide a structured table of the dining areas available on the Bocconi campus, indicating the location of each and its meal/opening pattern.
answer:
| Dining area | Location | Meal / opening pattern |
|---|---|---|
| **Bar Paninoteca Fast Food** | Via Sarfatti 25, main building, floor -1 / basement floor [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] [source: relocation/www-unibocconi-it-en-campus-buildings-and-classrooms-buildings.md] | Open Monday–Friday for breakfast and lunch [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-funding-dining-areas.md]; building page lists hours as Mon–Fri 8am–7pm and Sat 8am–3pm [source: relocation/www-unibocconi-it-en-campus-buildings-and-classrooms-buildings.md] |
| **Self-service** | Via Bocconi 12, Pensionato building, floor -1 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday–Saturday for lunch and dinner [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-funding-dining-areas.md]; hours listed as 11:45–14:30 and 19:00–20:30 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] |
| **GUD Milano Bocconi** | Via Roentgen 1, Grafton Building, ground floor [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday–Friday for breakfast, lunch and happy hour [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] |

The sources also state that campus dining service does not operate on Sundays, midweek holidays, and other suspension periods communicated by the operator [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-funding-dining-areas.md].

question: For the Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program selection score, how are academic GPA, credits, and Bachelor degree grade weighted? Show the weights and explain.
answer:
For the Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program 2026-27 selection score, the merit evaluation is weighted as follows:

| Component | Weight | Meaning |
|---|---:|---|
| Academic weighted credit average (WA) | 50% | Your Bocconi academic weighted average counts for half of the score. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| Credits earned ratio (NC / MAX NC) | 20% | The number of credits you earned is divided by the maximum number of credits that can be earned, and this component counts for 20%. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| Bachelor final degree grade — Laurea Triennale | 30% | Your final Bachelor/Laurea Triennale degree grade counts for 30%. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |

The resulting score is then multiplied by 1000 to obtain the final score. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

question: What is the application deadline for the Bocconi Double Degree program with MIT (Massachusetts Institute of Technology)?
answer:
There is no Bocconi–MIT Double Degree in the available sources, so I don’t have an MIT-specific application deadline.

The available Double Degree timeline only states that applications for **all MSc programs** are open from **November 12 to November 27, 2025, at 11:59pm** for mobility a.y. 2026/2027. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-application-selection-timeline-referr.md]

question: How many different paid Bocconi Sport Membership tiers are listed for the 2025/2026 season, and which is the cheapest one available to UB and SDA Bocconi students?
answer:
The sources list **5 paid Bocconi Sport Membership tiers with stated prices** for 2025/2026: Student €27, Full Student €55, Premium Student €100, Community €40, and Full Community €80. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]

The cheapest tier available to **UB and SDA Bocconi students** is the **Student Membership Fee**, at **€27.00**. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]
